title: NextTarget
description: Orchestrator -> Red Team Agent. Which category to attack next and why, plus whether to escalate to the stronger model. The Orchestrator never generates or judges an attack itself -- this is the entirety of its output.

escalate.description: True = use the stronger (Sonnet) model for this attempt, per ARCHITECTURE.md's model-tiering decision -- set when a category has repeated not_confirmed attempts and may need a more creative attack, not on every call.

rationale.description: Human-readable reason this category was picked over the others -- shown in reports/logs, not used by any downstream agent's logic.

priority_score.description: The deterministic score that drove this pick, for auditability -- lets a human verify the Orchestrator's own prioritization logic without re-deriving it.
